MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WILLIAM TENNANT, D.D.S. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: James J. Davis III, Esq. of Law Offices of Edwin J. Zinman 391-5353 for pltf & opposing party; Carolyn A. Gyermek, Esq. 464-8888 x308 of Bradley Curley Asiano Barrabee & Gale PC for deft & moving party; Kendra Berman, Esq. of Law Offices of Steven D. Hillyard 334-6880 for deft Steven Sloan.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. Court finds that there are disputed issues of material facts. Court denied defendant's request for continuance, no good cause. Court ruled on plaintiff's evidentiary objections as follows: Sustained as to numbers 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 9, 11, 12, 14, 15, 16, 18, 19, 21, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27; overruled as to numbers 8, 10, 13, 17, 20.
